title: Shenron Ultimate Wish
description:
The Eternal Dragon Shenron has been summoned. Only the most powerful hacker can exploit the Dragon Wish binary and claim ultimate power.

Exploit the buffer overflow in the wish-granting service to redirect execution to the `grant_wish` function and receive your unique flag.

hints.content: The binary was compiled without stack canaries or PIE. Classic ret2win.
Offset to RIP is 72 bytes. Find the address of grant_wish() using objdump -d ./shenron.
